steps.title: Translate the first account's yearly total
steps.content: Priya deposits $x$ dollars once each month for 12 months, so the yearly total for the first account is $12x$.

steps.title: Translate the second account's yearly total
steps.content: She deposits $y$ dollars twice each month, so each month contributes $2y$. Over 12 months that is $12 \cdot 2y = 24y$.

steps.title: Add the totals and compare with the choices
steps.content:
The two accounts combine to $7{,}200$: $$7{,}200 = 12x + 24y.$$
  • A) $7{,}200 = 12x + 12y$: treats $y$ as deposited only once a month. Eliminated.
  • B) $7{,}200 = 12x + 24y$: correct yearly totals for both accounts.
  • C) $7{,}200 = 24x + 12y$: swaps the once-vs-twice roles. Eliminated.
  • D) $7{,}200 = 24x + 24y$: doubles the first account incorrectly. Eliminated.
B is correct.
